transcript.text: In January 2026, the video called "Fall Asleep While I Hunt Sniper Players". The video has 2 million views. They spun out an entirely separate channel, Sleepy Sloths, dedicated entirely to this new format. And that channel has been racking up hundreds of thousands of views per video ever since. That is a creator who knows how to read data. And that skill, reading your own outliers, is the difference between a channel that stumbles onto something once and never does anything about it, and a channel that builds a sustainable format out of it.
